_meta.author: kokonutd
_meta.title: Chat Card
_meta.description:
A modern chat interface component that provides a complete messaging experience with reactions, status indicators, and theme support.

Features

- Message Display
  - Message history with timestamps
  - Read/delivered status indicators
  - User avatars and names
  - Message reactions with emoji
  - Message grouping by user

- Interactive Elements
  - Message input with emoji picker
  - Send button with status feedback
  - Reaction system with counters
  - More options menu
  - Online status indicators

- Visual Design
  - Light and dark theme support
  - Smooth transitions and animations
  - Clean and modern interface
  - Responsive layout
  - Accessible design
